content.en:
Although Ye Tian didn't know the members of the Guquan Xuanlou, it didn't affect the order of the Nine-Story Building to be conveyed to him.

Soon, Ye Tian knew why the Nine-Fold Building had summoned these half-step Sevenfold Ancestors.

"Black Abyss Behemoth True Blood!"

The Nine-Storied Building was ready to reward the True Blood of the Black Abyss Giant Beast to these half-step Sevenfold Ancestors, but it was not a gratuitous reward, and they needed to compete with these half-step Sevenfold Ancestors.

After all, there is only so much true blood of the Black Abyss Giant Beast, although it can be divided into multiple parts, but compared to the half-step sevenfold ancestors of the total nine-story building, it is very rare.

"The Black Abyss Behemoth should be the Black Abyss Behemoth that appeared in the Deep Spring Abyss before, otherwise it wouldn't be such a coincidence. The powerhouse of the Nine Towers killed the Black Abyss Behemoth and seized the true blood in its body. "

Judging from what I have learned, the true blood of the Black Abyss Giant Beast can greatly improve the life level of the Dao Ancestor, and it even has an effect on the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, but the effect is weak.

If the benefits are maximized, it is naturally used by the half-step sevenfold ancestor to create a half-step sevenfold ancestor whose life level reaches 9 or more.

"This opportunity must be seized, although my life level has been raised to 7.8, but it is still far from life level 9, I don't know how many opportunities it will take to hope to raise my life level to 9, so this opportunity must be seized!"

But he knew very well that not only did he want to seize this opportunity at all costs, but so did the other half-step Sevenfold Ancestors.

Even those half-step sevenfold ancestors who were very close to the life level were afraid that they were even more eager for the true blood of the Black Abyss Giant Beast!

Of course, this time the rewards are not based on the level of life, but according to the task.

From this time on, if you sign up, you can participate in the competition for the true blood of the Black Abyss Giant Beast, and the true blood is divided into a total of thirty-six parts, and each half-step sevenfold ancestor can only compete for one copy.

Of course, even if you get the top thirty-six, you still need points to buy the true blood of the Black Abyss Giant Beast, and it is impossible to give it for nothing.

The completion and submission of each task must be carried out in the Xuanlou, and the intermediate process must not have the help of other Dao Ancestors, otherwise once found, it will be regarded as a failure, and one authority will be reduced.

Therefore, this competition is very fair, even if it is a half-step sevenfold ancestor with a big background, there is no preferential treatment at all.

Soon.

The Nine-Story Building issued tasks one after another, and these tasks were prepared for a half-step seven-fold ancestor who participated in the registration.

There are difficult tasks and easy ones, but many tasks take a long time.

And this time the competition time is one million Origin Domain Era, in such a short time, if you take a very time-consuming task, you won't be able to do a few tasks at all, and naturally you won't be able to get many points.

Ye Tian took a look at these tasks, carefully selected, and quickly selected a task.

"Collect the Kaohuang fruit!"

The Kao Huang fruit comes from a primitive artifact called the Flower Crown, which is also relatively rare in number and is rarely encountered in the Silent Black Sea, and most of them are distributed in the Black Abyss.

And the black abyss is so dangerous, even the Eightfold Origin Ancestor doesn't dare to enter it casually, otherwise there is a risk of falling.

"Many of these missions released by the Nine-Story Building are dangerous, but the more dangerous they are, the more points they have, as long as you collect ten Kao Huang Fruits, you can get 500 points!"

And the only requirement is that it is not allowed to buy Kaohuang fruit, otherwise some strong people with deep backgrounds deliberately arrange people to trade with the half-step sevenfold ancestor, and it is naturally very simple to buy Kaohuang fruit.

In short, if you want to find a loophole, that's unlikely.

"For me, this task is not difficult, it is just a few more falls, and I can definitely collect ten Kaohuang fruits!"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian immediately copied a body and went to the Black Abyss, slowly looking for its traces in the area where the Flower Crown was often frequented according to the information of the Nine-Story Building.

For the first time, Ye Tian didn't know the situation in that area, and directly encountered an original artifact comparable to the Eightfold Ancestor, and was directly killed by the other party in seconds.

The second time it still failed!

The third time or a failure!

On the fourth time, Ye Tian found a flower crown, the strength of this flower crown was comparable to the top half-step sevenfold ancestor, but he was still easily killed by him and obtained a flower emperor fruit.

However, although he obtained the Kao Huang fruit, he did not return in time and fell directly into the black abyss.

It wasn't until the eighth time that Ye Tiancai successfully brought back a Kao Huang fruit.

"It's too difficult, it's me, it's them, it's not realistic to get together ten Kao Huang fruits!"

Although Ye Tian also knew that some half-step sevenfold ancestors were worth a lot of money, they had many treasures that could be refined into clones.

But once the clone falls, even if they continue to refine, it will take time to refine the clone, even if they have countless resources, they can't make up for this time.

Therefore, it was unlikely that the other half-step Sevenfold Ancestors would take on this task.

Time passed slowly, and after Ye Tian lost his duplicate body many times, he finally gathered ten Kao Huang fruits.

......

Ancient Spring Xuanlou.

Ye Tian handed over ten Kao Huang fruits.

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor is in charge of the task of the Ancient Spring Xuanlou, and he needs to detect whether these half-step sevenfold ancestors are cheating, and the Xuanlou Instrument Spirit cannot be identified, and they need these half-step ninefold ancestors to detect it.

Airplanes!!!

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor used an Primordial Dao Treasure to deduce whether Ye Tian was cheating or not.

Soon, the results came in.

No cheating!

"It's really incredible that this little guy has gathered ten Kaohuang fruits in such a short time!"

Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor secretly said.

He guessed that Ye Tian had a big secret, but which Dao Ancestor didn't have a secret?

He can roughly guess Ye Tian's means, either he can hide his own treasures, so that the primordial antiquities in the black abyss can't find him, or he has the treasures and means to quickly refine the clones, so that he can refine one clone after another, and through these clones, he constantly tries to hunt the Flower Crown and obtain the Flower Emperor Fruit.

As a half-step Ninefold Ancestor, he naturally has no interest in exploring the secrets of a little guy, and the Nine-Fold Building is not allowed to do this, otherwise every strong man would do this, and the Nine-Fold Building would have collapsed a long time ago.

......

"500 points!"

Ye Tian was in a very good mood.

But just 500 points is not enough to compete for the top 36, and he still has a few tasks to complete.

Subsequently, he picked another task.

This task has a lot of points, a full 600 points.

For the other half-step Sevenfold Ancestors, this task was not easy, but for him, the task was not difficult.

"Find the original antiquity, the Shadowless Man!"

Ye Tian felt that this task was very suitable for him, and it was also a task that had just appeared.

"Got it!"

Ye Tian smiled.
